image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Mitosis copies body cells; meiosis creates gametes with half the chromosomes.
Context visual: Both processes are vital for life. But why do they matter?
Escalation visual: Mitosis is all about growth and repair, duplicating cells perfectly.
Evidence visual: Meiosis, however, halves the chromosome number, creating genetic diversity.
Payoff visual: This means meiosis is key for evolution—new traits, new possibilities.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the wonders of biology? Like and follow for more!
